intro: Deprea abra-patriciae, also known as Abra Patricia, is a plant species native to Peru, belonging to the Solanaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various ailments such as wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. Bioactive constituents of Deprea abra-patriciae include alkaloids, glycosides, and phenolic compounds, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
